creator: ale@FreeBSD.org
text:
There is another PR with my "updated" (at least at that time) patch: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=274741

Recently I've also started working on a port to install the linux version of intellij.

And btw, I've pushed upstream the arm64 library for jna, so the next JNA release should contain pre-built binaries for i386/amd64/arm64.
